summary: Completed testing of NASSAQ Schedule Page with Drag & Drop, Hakim AI Assistant, and Admin Dashboard Quick Actions. Backend: 13/14 tests passed (93%). Frontend: All features verified working correctly.

minor.issue: Endpoint returns 404 - correct endpoint is /api/super-admin/dashboard-stats or /api/dashboard/stats

context_for_next_testing_agent: Schedule page fully functional with 750 sessions displayed. Hakim AI assistant working with GPT-5.2 integration. Admin Dashboard quick actions updated (Rules Management removed, Integrations added).

schedule_page.evidence: Schedule page loads at /school/schedule with full grid showing 5 days (Sunday-Thursday), 6 time periods, 25 teachers, and 750 sessions

schedule_filters.evidence: All filters working: Schedule select, Class filter, Teacher filter, Weekly/Daily view toggle

schedule_actions.evidence: Generate schedule button, Create new schedule button, Publish button all present and functional

drag_and_drop.evidence: 750 draggable session cards found with data-testid attributes. DnD components (DndContext, useDraggable, useDroppable) properly implemented

time_slots_api.evidence: GET /api/time-slots returns 7 time slots with duration_minutes field

seed_time_slots_api.evidence: POST /api/seed/time-slots/{school_id} returns existing message when slots exist

schedule_sessions_api.evidence: GET /api/schedule-sessions returns 750 sessions for the selected schedule

hakim_assistant.evidence: Hakim floating button opens panel with welcome message 'مرحباً! أنا حكيم، مساعدك الذكي'. Shows quick suggestion buttons and input field

hakim_chat_api.evidence: POST /api/hakim/chat returns AI response using GPT-5.2 via Emergent LLM Key

admin_quick_actions.evidence: Quick Actions section shows: إضافة مدرسة, إنشاء مستخدم, التقارير, التكاملات, إعدادات النظام. Rules Management correctly removed

reports_navigation.evidence: Reports button navigates to /admin/analytics page with comprehensive analytics dashboard
